title: senecio longiscapus
intro: Senecio longiscapus, also known as the Long-stalked Jacob's Ladder or Jacob's Ladder, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been utilized in herbal preparations to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Senecio longiscapus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
